Question: By what percentage of the coastal dune dissolved organic carbon export (COASTAL-DUNE-CARBON-EXP-07; "dissolved organic carbon export in fluvial runoff" in the "subpolar tundra polygonal ground" stratum) does it exceed the nitrous oxide release associated with fertilization pulse from the boreal swamp inventory (BOREAL-SWAMP-INVENTORY-12; "nitrous oxide release associated with fertilization pulse" in the "xeric shrub-steppe escarpment" stratum)?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT MagnitudeValue FROM BioregionalFluxLedger WHERE InventoryID = "COASTAL-DUNE-CARBON-EXP-07" AND FluxComponent = "dissolved organic carbon export in fluvial runoff" AND BioregionalStratum = "subpolar tundra polygonal ground") - (SELECT MagnitudeValue FROM BioregionalFluxLedger WHERE InventoryID = "BOREAL-SWAMP-INVENTORY-12" AND FluxComponent = "nitrous oxide release associated with fertilization pulse" AND BioregionalStratum = "xeric shrub-steppe escarpment")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT MagnitudeValue FROM BioregionalFluxLedger WHERE InventoryID = "COASTAL-DUNE-CARBON-EXP-07" AND FluxComponent = "dissolved organic carbon export in fluvial runoff" AND BioregionalStratum = "subpolar tundra polygonal ground"), 0) AS MagnitudeValue;

Question: By what percentage does yearly net carbon uptake at the coastal maritime heathy mosaic with salt-spray tolerant taxa — the regenerating birch-pioneer site with coarse woody debris recruitment and grazing exclusion established 5 years ago with limited trampling scars — exceed yearly net carbon uptake at the alluvial willow-carr interfingered with braided gravel bars — the early-successional graminoid-herb pioneer sward with low woody recruitment and windthrow patchwork with downed boles and pit-and-mound topography — when expressed as a percentage of the coastal site's uptake?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT NetAutotrophicFlux FROM EcosystemTransectCarbonFlux WHERE TransectReference = "TR-PAL-010" AND BiomeFacet = "coastal maritime heathy mosaic with salt-spray tolerant taxa" AND SuccessionalStratum = "regenerating birch-pioneer with coarse woody debris recruitment" AND DisturbanceLegacies = "grazing exclusion established 5 years ago, limited trampling scars") - (SELECT NetAutotrophicFlux FROM EcosystemTransectCarbonFlux WHERE TransectReference = "TR-CLD-066" AND BiomeFacet = "alluvial willow-carr interfingered with braided gravel bars" AND SuccessionalStratum = "early-successional graminoid-herb pioneer sward with low woody recruitment" AND DisturbanceLegacies = "windthrow patchwork with downed boles and pit-and-mound topography")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT NetAutotrophicFlux FROM EcosystemTransectCarbonFlux WHERE TransectReference = "TR-PAL-010" AND BiomeFacet = "coastal maritime heathy mosaic with salt-spray tolerant taxa" AND SuccessionalStratum = "regenerating birch-pioneer with coarse woody debris recruitment" AND DisturbanceLegacies = "grazing exclusion established 5 years ago, limited trampling scars"), 0) AS NetAutotrophicFlux;

Question: Compute the percentage change in organic carbon stored per hectare between the B-horizon illuvial clay- and Fe-enriched subsoil on coastal dunes (deltaic distributary channel levee and interdistributary bay facies; heathland dwarf shrub canopy with sparse tree recruitment) and the gleyed matrix horizon indicative of prolonged water saturation in a karstic sinkhole pond basin (saltmarsh halophytic prostrate mat with dwarf shrub inclusions), expressed relative to the coastal dune value (i.e., (coastal − sinkhole) / coastal × 100).
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT CarbonStockDensity FROM PedonCarbonRegister WHERE PlotRegistry = "PLT-ARC-001 coastal dune pedon with aeolian sand veneer" AND BiogeochemicalStratum = "B-horizon illuvial clay- and Fe-enriched subsoil with blocky structure" AND HydrogeomorphicSetting = "deltaic distributary channel levee and interdistributary bay facies" AND VegetationArchitectureClass = "heathland dwarf shrub canopy with sparse tree recruitment") - (SELECT CarbonStockDensity FROM PedonCarbonRegister WHERE PlotRegistry = "PLT-PLN-119 prairie relict pedon on calcareous loess mantle" AND BiogeochemicalStratum = "gleyed matrix horizon indicative of prolonged water saturation" AND HydrogeomorphicSetting = "karstic sinkhole pond basin with closed catchment hydrology" AND VegetationArchitectureClass = "saltmarsh halophytic prostrate mat with dwarf shrub inclusions")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT CarbonStockDensity FROM PedonCarbonRegister WHERE PlotRegistry = "PLT-ARC-001 coastal dune pedon with aeolian sand veneer" AND BiogeochemicalStratum = "B-horizon illuvial clay- and Fe-enriched subsoil with blocky structure" AND HydrogeomorphicSetting = "deltaic distributary channel levee and interdistributary bay facies" AND VegetationArchitectureClass = "heathland dwarf shrub canopy with sparse tree recruitment"), 0) AS CarbonStockDensity;
